products.name: GE322LPF2
products.comparisonStatusReason: Multi-mix / site-variation EPD whose GWP totals are reported in mix-specific tables without a single clean lifecycle-module header; not source-reviewed into comparable per-product values. Visible for review, excluded from comparison.
reviewNotes: GWP totals present in the PDF but in a non-standard mix-specific layout; require manual per-mix review before comparison.
Values source-reviewed via text/table cross-validation of pdfplumber output against the source EPD (page rendering unavailable in the build environment).
No GWP-total lifecycle row was mapped from tables in the automated pass.
